critical_audit_matters.matter: Deferred Revenue Related to Loyalty Program
critical_audit_matters.description: Actuarially determined based on anticipated timing of future point redemptions including breakage estimate for points that will not be redeemed. Changes in breakage assumptions could materially change the liability.
critical_audit_matters.audit_response: Tested controls, tested underlying data (points earned/redeemed), developed independent actuarial estimates.

critical_audit_matters.description: Carrying value of reporting unit exceeded fair value. Weighted methodology using discounted future cash flow and guideline public companies method.
critical_audit_matters.audit_response: Tested controls, evaluated projected future cash flows vs historical results and analyst reports, involved fair value specialists for discount/capitalization rates.

accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Performance obligations satisfied over time using output method based on observable outputs. Hotel revenues and operating profits indicate value derived by third-party owners and franchisees. Royalty fees treated as sales-based royalties.

depreciation_amortization.method: Not explicitly stated in excerpt; D&A was $333M (2024), $397M (2023), $426M (2022) — declining as asset-light strategy reduces property base

lease_accounting.policy: Primarily operating leases for land, buildings, office space, equipment. ROU assets assessed for impairment quarterly.
lease_accounting.extension_options: 1-25 years; included when reasonably certain to exercise
lease_accounting.ibr_basis: Estimated using currency risk, credit risk, recent debt issuances, comparable instruments

impairment_policy.goodwill: Evaluated annually in Q4. $110M impairment in 2024 in management and franchising reporting unit.

loyalty_program.name: World of Hyatt
loyalty_program.description: Funds collected deposited in segregated accounts, invested in fixed income securities. Annual independent audit. Assessment currently 4.5% of eligible revenue.

subsequent_events.noted: Form 8-K filed March 26, 2025 included as Exhibit A-2. Specific subsequent events not detailed in available excerpt.

related_party_transactions.key_affiliate_services: Hyatt Corporation provides most Mandatory and Non-Mandatory Services. Rosemont provides optional purchasing. Revenue from franchisee services (excl Commercial Services Fee): $2,577,599. Supplier rebates: $336,271 (offset against System Services Costs). Franchisee loyalty surplus: $7,393,115.

organization.segment_realignment: Realigned operating segments in 2024 to align with business strategy and leadership changes

acquisitions_and_dispositions.asset_light_strategy: Significant real estate dispositions ($1.245B in gains) and declining property/equipment ($2.340B to $1.689B) indicate continued asset-light pivot.
